name: Quiver of Thunder
description: Notes Often abbreviated to “QoT”, the Quiver of Thunder is one of two ways to reliably inflict Dazed. The alternative, the Brain of the Golem, can be impractical - it is placed on you, and lasts for 7 seconds before dazing.
effects: Vulnerable: Targets receive 115% damage for 3 seconds after being hit. Dazed for 3 seconds
